backend.changelog: Pre-Generate close-foreign-docs prompt now runs BEFORE attempting to open the BOM root assembly, so leftover non-BOM documents that were blocking SolidWorks Connector's fresh root open get cleared first. Workstation Apply Update for CadBridge 1.8.50 strongly recommended -- the upfront non-BOM doc close is now reliable end-to-end (1.8.49 left ActiveDoc null after multi-close, which 1.8.50 fixes by force-activating a remaining candidate before the orchestrator continues).

cadBridge.changelog: Fixes 'No active document in SolidWorks' error after the upfront foreign-doc close. When the previously-active doc was one of the closed foreign docs, SolidWorks Connector did not auto-activate the next doc reliably -- leaving ActiveDoc null and the orchestrator's title-based activeDoc fallback unable to recover (especially on Part-as-root BOMs where the BOM title differs from the disk filename). 1.8.50 detects ActiveDoc=null after the close pass and ActivateDoc3 on the first remaining open document (guaranteed to be a candidate since the pre-cleanup only closes non-candidates). The orchestrator's ActiveDoc readback then sees a non-null handle and Generate proceeds.
